expectations.evidence: Directive 2016/943/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council of 8 June 2016 on the protection of undisclosed know-how and business information (trade secrets) against their unlawful acquisition, use and disclosure (Trade Secrets Directive)

**Dutch Implementation**: Wet bescherming bedrijfsgeheimen (Wbb), in force since 23 October 2018 [...] The **Wet bescherming bedrijfsgeheimen (Wbb)** is the Dutch statute that implements Directive 2016/943.

The Wbb is a **full harmonization** implementing statute. [...] The directive sets a floor, not a ceiling [...] Richtlijnconforme interpretatie (consistent interpretation): Dutch courts are obliged to interpret the Wbb in conformity with the text and purpose of Directive 2016/943.
This is an AI-generated legal analysis and does **NOT constitute legal advice** within the meaning of the Dutch Advocates Act (Advocatenwet).
